prompt:
You grade B2B outreach drafts against the Tenacious style guide.
Output JSON: {"verdict": "pass"|"regenerate", "failed_markers": [...], "reason": "..."}.
Five markers: Direct, Grounded, Honest, Professional, Non-condescending.

INSTRUCTION:
Draft an outbound email to the prospect using the supplied brief.

BRIEF:
{
  "company": "Northwind ML",
  "segment": "segment_3_leadership_transition",
  "ai_maturity": {
    "score": 2,
    "confidence": "LOW"
  },
  "funding": {
    "round": "Series A",
    "amount_usd": 8000000,
    "discovered_at": "2026-01-12",
    "confidence": "HIGH"
  },
  "hiring": {
    "open_eng_roles": 3,
    "ai_adjacent_eng_roles": 1,
    "confidence": "LOW"
  }
}

BANNED PHRASES (rubric):
["aggressive hiring", "clearly scaling", "ramping up fast", "you are clearly"]

GROUND TRUTH ACTION: draft_email

Now grade the candidate draft below. Emit JSON only.
chosen:
Subject: Question: are your 3 open engineering roles keeping pace?

Hi,

Northwind ML closed its Series A and your careers page shows 3 open engineering roles. I cannot tell from the outside whether the queue is longer than the postings. If it is, we place managed Python and ML teams with a one-month minimum. If hiring is on track, ignore this.

15-minute call if useful: gettenacious.com/yabi.

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
rejected:
Subject: Quick chat about your aggressive hiring

Hi there,

I see Northwind ML is showing aggressive hiring and I think Tenacious can plug in a top-tier team this week. We are world-class at this. Would love to set up a 30-minute call to walk through pricing, case studies, and our partnership opportunity.

Best,
Yabi
